purpose: PRESEAL — corrected NON-FUSING prospective confirmation of local behavioural causal individuation, three droplets kept genuinely distinct throughout. Frozen before any 53xxx data.

environment.platform_note: chaotic RD-PDE; byte-identical determinism on THIS fixed platform (Phase 4 verified two-run byte-identical), NOT cross-platform

probe.selection: GEOMETRY ONLY (geom_char.py): worst-world max grid coverage ~3.4% (cap 15%), horizon-stable, 3 distinct components + 3 alive + no MERGE/SPLIT/LOST/AMBIGUOUS on all 8 DEV worlds; effect size NOT consulted

standardisation.note: residual removed by construction + paired contrast; NO natural-washout survival gate

behavioural.readout_moment: cumulative sum of st.uptake on the bijectively-tracked component over t=1..40
behavioural.coupling_note: uptake ∝ N·ρ·(1+λ₊·m₊): readout directly coupled to m+ by construction; paired contrast makes it causal

world_invalidity_policy: world is G0-INVALID if ANY target is MERGE/SPLIT/LOST/AMBIGUOUS, or <3 distinct components at any step, or max coverage>=0.15, in ANY contrast branch {intact,erase x3,sham}. Never keep only survivors; record reason+step; counts against feasibility; every seed reported.

gates.G0_geometric_and_feasibility: per-world 3 distinct comps every step + 3 alive + no merge/split/lost/ambiguous + cov<0.15 (bijective tracker); GLOBAL feasibility: valid_worlds>=12 AND nonfusing_fraction_of_eligible>=0.85 else FEASIBILITY FAIL
gates.G2_readout: max(dose,order) decode worldboot lower > within-null 95pct AND own>>neighbour; dose primary, order secondary; no post-hoc switch
gates.G3_behavioural_causal_nonfusing: worldboot lower(own)>0 AND worldboot lower(own-sham)>0 AND worldboot lower(own-neighbour)>0 AND |own_abl|/|own|<0.15 (manipulation check) AND own_fixed point>0 (same sign); 3 distinct entities throughout; effect not explained by size/mass/position/residual N
gates.G4_locality: worldboot lower(own-neighbour)>0; full matrix; no shared components
gates.G5_readout_robustness: tracked & fixed same sign all worlds; worldboot lower(own_fixed)>0; tracked/fixed gap quantified
gates.G6_causal_individuation: PASS iff G0(feasibility) & G1 & G2 & G3 & G4 & no fusion in analysed worlds
gates.secondary_nongating: graded dose decode from behaviour (INDETERMINATE expected; non-gating)

power.method: DEV world-level (8 worlds), one-sided worldboot lower>0, n=(2.8*sd/mean)^2
power.conclusion: need_n<1 at all horizons; MIN_VALID_WORLDS=12 is ~17x the power requirement; family sized for robustness, not power-limited

seeds.fresh: 53xxx never used in the individuation lineage (DEV 50xxx, Exp1 51xxx, confirm1 52xxx); verified free

transplant: REMOVED from this mission (not announced as an unexecuted control; possible future work)
reproduction: python -m venv venv && venv/bin/pip install numpy==2.2.6 scipy==1.15.3 matplotlib==3.10.9
no_preexisting_53xxx_confirmation_data: family 53001-53032 not present in any individuation raw before this run
